scripts.prepare:app: npm run prepare:precision && npm run prepare:mastery && npm run prepare:atlas && node scripts/fix-globe-fill-rule.mjs && npm run prepare:microstates && npm run prepare:borders
scripts.build: npm run prepare:app && vite build --config vite.atlas.config.mjs && node scripts/install-pwa-shell.mjs && node scripts/generate-country-catalog.mjs && node scripts/verify-security-config.mjs && node scripts/verify-dist.mjs && node scripts/verify-country-catalog.mjs && node scripts/verify-asset-budgets.mjs
